title: Clinical Anatomy PhD Program Application and Fees
content:
Clinical Anatomy PhD Program Application and Fees

2025-2026 Spring Semester online application deadline: December 15, 2025

Application Deadline: Sunday, January 18, 2026

SCIENCE EXAM:

Date: Monday, January 19, 2026

Time: 2:00 PM

Exam Venue: Üsküdar University Health Campus, Classroom 707

Results Announcement Date: Wednesday, January 28, 2026

Main List Registration Deadlines: January 28 - February 4, 2026

Reserve List Registration Deadlines: February 5 - 13, 2026

Click here

for Online Pre-Registration Link.

ALES Score Type:

NUMERIC (NUM)

The candidates will receive 50% of the ALES score in the relevant score type, 30% of the science exam, and 20% of the undergraduate graduation grade point average.

- Original or certified copy of the undergraduate diploma

-Original or certified copy of the undergraduate transcript (transcript)

-ALES exam result document

-Copy of identity card

-Photo (2 Pieces)

SPECIAL CONDITIONS FOR CANDIDATES

- To have a score of 55 or more in YDS and an equivalent exam.

- Undergraduate graduation GPA must be at least 2.5 out of 4 coefficients.

- Being a graduate of Medicine, Dentistry, Veterinary Medicine

ALES result document; 55 points from the numerical score type.

-Applicants will be selected in order of success.

TUITION FEE:
